project: Ink CLI Session UI V2 Web Parity
description: Implement Web-parity Ink rendering for shared descriptors and final real PTY-backed end-to-end validation.

userStories.title: Render rich shared descriptors in Ink
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want the terminal transcript and cards to match Web Compact Terminal semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: Ink renders user, assistant, reasoning, tool call, tool status, thinking, login, model, yielded-run, compaction, and error descriptors
Markers, labels, ordering, tones, and status meanings align with Web Compact Terminal View within terminal limits
Snapshot-like clean-output tests cover representative descriptors
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in d77b423. Ink transcript rendering now consumes shared terminal card descriptors through InkTerminalCard for status, thinking, model, login, tool, yielded-run, compaction, command, and error rows while preserving user, assistant, and reasoning row rendering. Shared card descriptor extraction now includes function-call names/inputs and string output fallback so tool and run cards carry Web-aligned labels and details. Snapshot-like evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs' passed 56/56 focused tests. test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs asserts rich descriptor clean output for user, assistant, reasoning, tool call/status, thinking, login, model, yielded-run, compaction, command, and redacted error cards. Path classification: renderer/shared unit path plus real PTY validation for the status card in US-002; no Web DOM imports were added to Ink modules. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 515 tests; 514 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.

userStories.title: Render shared rich status card with bars
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want /status to show owner, runtime, context, and quota information with terminal bars.
acceptanceCriteria: Status card shows effective owner, session id/title/profile, model, runtime state, queue/stream state, cwd, thinking, fast mode, and warnings/errors
Context and provider usage render as readable terminal bars when available
Missing data displays as unavailable and secrets are redacted
pibo debug pty runs /status and asserts owner, session, model/runtime, and bar labels in clean output
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in d77b423. /status now renders a shared rich terminal status card text built from buildTerminalStatusViewModel, including owner, session id/title/profile, model, runtime state, queue, processing/streaming, cwd, thinking level, fast mode, context usage bar, provider usage bar, warnings/errors, and redacted message text. Local CLI status now forwards runtime queued/processing/streaming/cwd/thinking/fast/context/provider/warning/error fields, and the deterministic debug PTY router supplies context and provider usage fixtures. Focused evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs' passed 56/56 focused tests; renderCliStatusCardText tests assert bars, unavailable-vs-zero semantics, and redaction. PTY command: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && rm -rf .tmp/pty-rich-status .tmp/pty-rich-status-home && mkdir -p .tmp/pty-rich-status-home && npm run dev -- debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-rich-status --timeout-ms 70000 --idle-timeout-ms 15000 --cols 140 --rows 46 --wait-for "Select room for Web user status" --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --type "/status" --press Enter --wait-for "Status: source=local/direct" --expect "Owner: Web user status (user:status)" --expect "Session: New CLI session" --expect "Runtime: local" --expect "Model: unknown" --expect "Context:" --expect "openai requests:" --expect "TOKEN=[redacted]" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.tmp/pty-rich-status-home PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_OWNERS=user:status node dist/bin/pibo.js tui:sessions --owner-scope user:status' — passed. PTY classification: real PTY-backed pibo tui:sessions path with LocalCliSessionSource, temp PIBO_HOME, and deterministic mocked local router/source; no live provider credentials. Raw artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-rich-status/raw.ansi.log. Clean artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-rich-status/clean.txt. Observed clean output shows Status: source=local/direct, Owner Web user status, Session New CLI session, Model unknown, Runtime local, Queue/Processing/Streaming/CWD, Thinking high, Fast mode off, Context bar 12.5%, openai requests bar 25.0%, and TOKEN=[redacted]. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 515 tests; 514 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.

userStories.title: Add narrow terminal and no-color fallbacks
userStories.description: As an SSH user, I want the TUI to remain readable in small or limited terminals.
acceptanceCriteria: Narrow terminals wrap or truncate without hiding owner, session, errors, or active command state
No-color mode remains readable with text markers
Large transcripts remain bounded and performant
pibo debug pty runs with constrained columns and asserts clean readable output
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in dd6b70433e48a080cc2229dab378611c836e4990. Added a narrow-terminal header fallback in InkSessionAppView: when line width is constrained, the header expands into bounded lines for Pibo CLI Sessions/source/mode, Owner, Session, and Agent/Model so owner and session state remain visible instead of being hidden behind a single truncated line. Existing row/card rendering remains bounded through maxLineChars and tail-window maxRows. Added focused renderer tests in test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs covering constrained-width owner/session/error/active-command readability, secret redaction, no-color text-marker readability, and bounded large transcripts. Focused evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke.test.mjs test/debug-pty.test.mjs' passed 15/15 focused tests. Narrow/no-color PTY command: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && rm -rf .tmp/pty-narrow-no-color .tmp/pty-narrow-no-color-home && mkdir -p .tmp/pty-narrow-no-color-home && npm run dev -- debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-narrow-no-color --timeout-ms 70000 --idle-timeout-ms 15000 --cols 44 --rows 26 --env NO_COLOR=1 --wait-for "Select room for Web user nar" --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Personal" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --type "/status" --press Enter --wait-for "Status: source=local/direct" --expect "Owner: Web user narrow" --expect "Session: New CLI session" --expect "Context:" --type "/th" --wait-for "Slash commands" --expect "/thinking" --expect "› /th" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.tmp/pty-narrow-no-color-home PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_OWNERS=user:narrow node dist/bin/pibo.js tui:sessions --owner-scope user:narrow' — passed. PTY classification: real PTY-backed pibo tui:sessions path with LocalCliSessionSource, temp PIBO_HOME, deterministic mocked local router/source, constrained columns, and NO_COLOR=1; no live provider credentials. Raw artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-narrow-no-color/raw.ansi.log. Clean artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-narrow-no-color/clean.txt. Observed result: clean output shows the split narrow header with Owner Web user narrow, Session New CLI session, status card owner/session/context lines, slash suggestions with /thinking, and preserved active input › /th. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke.test.mjs test/debug-pty.test.mjs && npm run typecheck' passed focused tests and typecheck. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 520 tests; 519 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.

userStories.title: Create reusable pibo debug pty smoke scripts
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want repeatable PTY scripts and artifacts for user-facing TUI behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Add documented pibo debug pty scenarios for owner picker, room picker, session creation, message send, slash suggestions, /status, /thinking or equivalent interactive command, and --session transcript hydration
Scenarios assert clean output and retain raw ANSI artifacts for debugging
Scripts have bounded timeouts and clear failure diagnostics
Documentation explains how Ralph agents must record artifact paths in story notes
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in dd6b70433e48a080cc2229dab378611c836e4990. Added reusable PTY smoke runner scripts/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke.mjs and documentation docs/reports/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke-scenarios.md. The runner exposes --list, --dry-run, --scenario, and --artifact-root; uses bounded pibo debug pty run timeouts; saves raw/clean/screen/metadata/input/assertion artifacts; and includes deterministic scenarios for owner picker + room picker + session creation + message send, slash suggestions + /status + /thinking picker, and prepared --session transcript hydration. Added test/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke.test.mjs to verify scenario discovery, dry-run command construction, bounded timeout flags, and evidence documentation. Focused evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke.test.mjs test/debug-pty.test.mjs' passed 15/15 focused tests. Reusable smoke command executed: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && node scripts/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke.mjs --scenario slash-suggestions-status-thinking --artifact-root .tmp/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke-validation' — passed. Script classification: reusable deterministic real PTY-backed pibo tui:sessions smoke path with LocalCliSessionSource, temp PIBO_HOME, and mocked local router/source; not live provider. Raw artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke-validation/slash-suggestions-status-thinking/raw.ansi.log. Clean artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke-validation/slash-suggestions-status-thinking/clean.txt. Observed result: clean output shows room/session creation, slash suggestions while typing /status and /th, /status rich card with owner/context fields, /thinking picker with xhigh available, and Thinking level set to high. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke.test.mjs test/debug-pty.test.mjs && npm run typecheck' passed focused tests and typecheck. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 520 tests; 519 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.

userStories.title: Final Web parity and installed CLI validation
userStories.description: As a release reviewer, I want full test and installed CLI evidence before deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: npm test passes
npm run typecheck passes
Chat Web regression/typecheck/build checks pass for Web-impacting changes
Global or built package install is tested, then pibo debug pty runs installed pibo tui:sessions through owner/room/session/message flow
Web/API/store check confirms the installed CLI-created session appears in the selected user's Web room
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
userStories.notes: Completed in 0370e039a1de7782b863858927af73fe4eceafd6. Final gates passed after installing the built package in the dedicated Docker worker and fixing the telemetry retention prune regression that previously blocked the full suite. Commands: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run chat-ui:typecheck && npm run chat-ui:build && npm run typecheck' passed; docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/telemetry-store.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs' passed 17/17 focused tests; docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck && npm test' passed 521/521 tests. Installed CLI validation command: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm install -g . >/tmp/pibo-install-global.log && rm -rf .tmp/pty-installed-final .tmp/pty-installed-final-home && mkdir -p .tmp/pty-installed-final-home && pibo debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-installed-final --timeout-ms 90000 --idle-timeout-ms 18000 --cols 140 --rows 46 --wait-for "Select room for Web user final" --expect "Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --type "Installed PTY visible in Web" --press Enter --wait-for "Installed assistant final" --expect "Message sent" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.tmp/pty-installed-final-home PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_ASSISTANT_REPLY="Installed assistant final" pibo tui:sessions --owner-scope user:final' — PTY passed. PTY classification: installed global pibo command, real PTY-backed pibo tui:sessions path with LocalCliSessionSource and real temp PiboDataStore; deterministic mocked local router/source only to avoid live provider credentials. Raw artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-installed-final/raw.ansi.log. Clean artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-installed-final/clean.txt. Observed clean output shows selected owner Web user final (user:final), Personal Chat room picker, + New session in Personal Chat, Created session, typed user message Installed PTY visible in Web, assistant reply Installed assistant final, and Message sent. Store/Web-read-model check queried /workspace/.tmp/pty-installed-final-home/pibo.sqlite and confirmed session ps_81d9f8a4-20c7-43bd-9e70-ed91e0c76d22 has owner_scope=user:final, room_id=room_0cdb603e-c6fc-4ae7-8ae9-d01e671aa1db, matching session_navigation owner/room/status idle and last_message_preview Installed assistant final, plus user and assistant chat_messages and event_log rows in the same room. Web URL for manual/API verification: http://127.0.0.1:4822/apps/chat/rooms/room_0cdb603e-c6fc-4ae7-8ae9-d01e671aa1db/sessions/ps_81d9f8a4-20c7-43bd-9e70-ed91e0c76d22.
